equalizer.reason: The four-entry delayed-update queue expands into mutually exclusive count/collision arms; all modes, freeze, legal collision behavior, and convergence are checked semantically and in bit-exact co-simulation.

fir_decimator.reason: Migen expands the polyphase tap-offset and memory-address selectors into structural case arms that Verilator does not credit even when every valid tap executes; multiple geometries, backpressure, runtime reload, and pruned halfband behavior are checked semantically.

fir_decimator_pipelined.reason: Migen expands the pipelined tap-offset/address selectors and mutually exclusive fill/drain states into generated case arms; one-tap and multi-tap geometries, randomized backpressure, and runtime reload are checked semantically.

fir_interpolator.reason: Migen expands the polyphase tap and phase selectors into structural case arms that Verilator does not credit even when every valid phase executes; multiple geometries, backpressure, and pruned halfband behavior are checked semantically.

fir_interpolator_pipelined.reason: Migen expands the pipelined polyphase tap and phase selectors into structural case arms that Verilator does not credit even when every valid phase executes; both interpolator architectures and multiple geometries are checked by the same bit-exact randomized test.

ldpc_decoder.reason: The fixed 802.11n topology duplicates selector arms for every edge and layer; outcome coverage is more meaningful than hitting every structurally repeated arm.

ldpc_decoder_z_parallel.reason: The 27 replicated lanes expand constant rotation maps and mutually exclusive edge-register write arms; model identity covers converged and failure outcomes more meaningfully than generated-line hits.

pfb_channelizer_fft.reason: Migen expands DIF addressing and natural-order bit reversal into exhaustive constant case arms that do not map cleanly to source-line coverage.

pfb_channelizer_fft_2x.reason: Migen expands the shared DIF addressing and natural-order bit reversal into exhaustive constant case arms that do not map cleanly to source-line coverage; the overlapping M/2-hop history and odd-bin phase correction are checked independently.
